name: Lappland the Decadenza
description:
"Getting Lappalter in 40 pulls makes you make a bot for her in just two hours after her release on global."

Caster Operator Lappland the Decadenza from Arknights. Lappland, unemployed, the sole daughter of Alberto, current Don of Saluzzo famiglia of Siracusa. Now, she has left the famiglia. Proficient in solo missions and provides assistance to Rhodes Island in tactical assaults and purges.

How did your pulls for Lappy go? Did you get who you wanted to get?
creator: Anarchy_Shu
